name: lsp-inspect
description: Full code quality audit for a file, package, or directory. Supports batch mode (directory walk with --top ranking), comparison mode (--diff for branch-only issues), severity calibration by blast radius, fix suggestions, and confidence tiers. Applies a check taxonomy (dead symbols, silent failures, error wrapping, coverage gaps, test coverage, doc drift, unrecovered panics, context propagation, concurrency safety) using LSP-first strategies. Concurrency checks cover 25 languages across 4 families
author: blackwell-systems
summary_zh: 通过 LSP 对单文件、包或整个目录做代码质量审计，能批量扫描并按严重程度排序，也支持分支差异对比，覆盖死代码、错误处理、测试缺失、并发安全等多种问题，并给出修复建议，适合 PR 审查和代码库整体体检。
